segments.text: It connects, but the confirmed punish was up B there—they went with up tilt instead.
segments.original_text: 当たりますがここは上B確定反撃でしたが上強攻撃ですね

segments.text: Position's a little too high though.
segments.original_text: ちょっと位置が高すぎましたが

segments.text: And they grab and up throw, but it's not guaranteed, so...
segments.original_text: そして掴んで上に投げて確定をしないので

segments.text: They read it and come down with fair, and...
segments.original_text: 一回様子を見て空前に降ってと

full_text: It connects, but the confirmed punish was up B there—they went with up tilt instead. Position's a little too high though. And they grab and up throw, but it's not guaranteed, so... They read it and come down with fair, and... That's hilarious!

corrections.original: 上必殺技確定反撃でした強攻撃
corrections.corrected: 上B確定反撃でしたが上強攻撃
